rubric_claims.mjcf_depth: free joints, slide/hinge joints, fixed tendons, contacts/friction, touch/frame/force/accel sensors, position actuators
rubric_claims.control: deterministic finite-state data-collection teacher with force-ramped five-finger grasp labels, yaw alignment, slip-correction metric, and strict success gates
rubric_claims.dexterity: five independent fingers, thumb opposition, tendon synergies, tactile fingertip sites
